{{Quote|Well, a fresh face for the game. I wonder, would you care to play?|Furko, asking [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] to play [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Furko Nellis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] living during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was an experienced [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] who [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] encountered in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[3956 BBY]]. Revan defeated Nellis in three games of pazaak, each one with higher stakes, and with Nellis using a more advanced deck than the one before. Eventually, Furko Nellis gave up on betting against Revan, claiming it was an insult to bet against such a good pazaak player. However, Nellis was still willing to play against Revan, without betting.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The head used for Furko Nellis is the exact same as one of the male Revans. A different one is used if the player chooses this head for Revan.
